acp.description: Agent Communication Protocol connector for linking agents through an ACP gateway.

anthropic.description: Anthropic model provider for Claude chat and reasoning models.

bluebubbles.description: BlueBubbles connector for sending and receiving iMessage chats through the BlueBubbles bridge.

elevenlabs.description: ElevenLabs voice plugin for text-to-speech generation and conversational audio output.

eliza-classic.description: Compatibility plugin for loading classic ElizaOS behavior and legacy agent workflows.

farcaster.description: Farcaster connector for publishing casts and responding to social conversations.

feishu.description: Feishu connector for bots, chats, and workflow notifications on Lark/Feishu.

google-chat.description: Google Chat connector for bots, spaces, and message-driven workflows.

groq.description: Groq model provider for low-latency chat and inference workloads.

imessage.description: iMessage connector for Mac-based conversations and message automation.

line.description: LINE connector for bot messaging and customer conversations.

local-ai.description: LocalAI provider for self-hosted, OpenAI-compatible local model inference.

matrix.description: Matrix connector for rooms, bots, and federated chat workflows.

minecraft.description: Minecraft automation app for driving Mineflayer bots from Milady agents.

nostr.description: Nostr connector for relay-based social posting and conversation handling.

ollama.description: Ollama provider for running local LLMs on your own machine.

openrouter.description: OpenRouter provider for routing requests across many hosted models through one API.

roblox.description: Roblox app integration for agent-driven gameplay and interactive experiences.

s3-storage.description: S3-compatible object storage plugin for saving files, media, and generated artifacts.

sql.description: SQL database adapter for persistent agent state, memory, and logs.

telegram.description: Telegram connector for bot chats, groups, channels, and topic-based conversations.

tlon.description: Tlon connector for Urbit chat and social interactions.

twitch.description: Twitch connector for live chat, channel events, and audience interactions.

vercel-ai-gateway.description: Vercel AI Gateway provider for routing model requests through a single endpoint.

zalo.description: Zalo connector for official account messaging and support workflows.

zalouser.description: Zalo personal-account connector for one-to-one messaging workflows.
